proposal_summary: This proposal requests a contribution of 500,000 ARB each to Coin Center and DeFi Education Fund from the ArbitrumDAO to support their policy, litigation, and advocacy efforts regarding open-source software and developers' rights.

disclosed_entities.name: Coin Center
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The ArbitrumDAO is being provided the opportunity to vote & effect a contribution to Coin Center

disclosed_entities.name: DeFi Education Fund
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The ArbitrumDAO is being provided the opportunity to vote & effect a contribution to the DEF

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum Foundation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The funds will from this proposal will initially be sent to an account controlled by the Arbitrum Foundation 0x5bb0a919345aF084854BCDc9A6DDdE8b7FEe79aD

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: account controlled by the Arbitrum Foundation 0x5bb0a919345aF084854BCDc9A6DDdE8b7FEe79aD

claimed_actions.raw_action: Transfer 500,000 ARB each to Coin Center and DeFi Education Fund via the Arbitrum Foundation.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund Coin Center and DeFi Education Fund for their advocacy and litigation efforts.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Coin Center and DeFi Education Fund will receive 500,000ARB each. The funds will from this proposal will initially be sent to an account controlled by the Arbitrum Foundation 0x5bb0a919345aF084854BCDc9A6DDdE8b7FEe79aD , who will handle the transfers

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires standard token transfers to specified organizations via a designated foundation address with a vesting schedule.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Coin Center and DeFi Education Fund will receive 500,000ARB each. ... 60% of the funds will be directly sent to Coin Center and DeFi Education Fund with the remaining 40% being vested in a linear manner with no cliff for a period of 4 months thereafter.

limitations: The target addresses for the actual recipient entities (Coin Center and DeFi Education Fund) are not provided.
The mechanism for linear vesting is not technically detailed.
